# Nitin Matiyali

> SaaS GTM leader, 1x Founder, Ex-McKinsey. Based in Bengaluru, India.

## About

Nitin Matiyali is a product marketing and go-to-market strategy executive with 12+ years of experience across strategy consulting, product leadership, and company building.

He currently leads Product Marketing & GTM Strategy at Fuel Cycle, an AI-powered market research platform used by enterprise brands to accelerate decision-making.

He previously co-founded getCurious, an AI-powered user research platform that was acquired by Fuel Cycle in 2025. getCurious served 40+ enterprise clients including Tata Digital, Kotak Mahindra Bank, and upGrad.

Before founding getCurious, Nitin was a Consultant at McKinsey & Company, where he led engagements across Energy, Healthcare, and Public Sector. He also served as AVP of Revenue Management and Homeowner Product at OYO, where he launched the UK vacation homes business and scaled it to $350K MRR in 4 months.

## Education

- Indian School of Business — Post-graduate Program in Management
- Indian Institute of Technology, Bombay — Bachelor's, Chemical Engineering
- GMAT: 770/800 | GRE: 1560/1600

## Skills

Product Marketing, GTM Strategy, Positioning, Messaging, Corporate Strategy, Market Entry, P&L Ownership, B2B SaaS, AI Products, Market Research, UX Research, Cross-functional Leadership
